englishDefinitions: A humorous or insulting phrase used to refer to someone who has authority or power over the speaker, suggesting the speaker is annoyed but cannot openly challenge them.
persianTranslation: کسی که نمی‌توانم ازش حساب بکشم
کسی که نمی‌توانم با او دربیفتم
examples: He joked about complaining to the boss, whose ass he cannot kick.
The phrase is vulgar and should be used only in very informal contexts.
She was angry with the manager, but he was clearly someone whose ass she could not kick.
synonyms: a person with power over me
